_readme: w-bonkers state file — THE single source of truth. The installer fills every {{PLACEHOLDER}}; the refresh command edits this file; scripts/render_plan.py regenerates every view from it. Never hand-edit rendered views. Delete the _readme/_comment keys after filling if you like — the renderer ignores them.

pinned._comment: FIXED inputs the refresh command reads every run — edit HERE to change strategy inputs, never edit the command file.
pinned.indicators: RSI(14 Wilder), MACD(12,26,9), SMA 20/50/200, ATR(14), 52w hi/lo, 20-day swing low

regime_gate._comment: Evidence: docs/BACKTEST.md — breakout buys taken while the index closed below its 200-DMA were net losers under every exit ruleset tested (exits are never gated). Set enabled:false to opt out.

bucket_labels._comment: Optional pretty names for buckets_inr keys; unknown keys fall back to Title Case.

buckets_inr._comment_delete_me: REPLACE with your buckets. Keys are yours to choose (e.g. stocks / fund_sleeve / event_earmark / dip_buffer). Values MUST sum exactly to meta.corpus_inr — the renderer validates this.

positions._comment_delete_me: One object per stock leg. Shape (all fields): ticker, theme, role core|small|conditional, status pending|done, action BUY|SELL, shares int, amount_inr int, entry '910-940' or 'reclaim 422', stop number, target '1150-1200', due 'YYYY-MM-DD' or null, trigger text or null (null due => trigger task), todoist_task_id null (backfilled by sync), note text. When filled add: done_on, fill.
